requirements.text: WHEN user hovers over the Board|List button while in documents view, the system shall NOT display an overlay
WHEN user clicks the Board|List button while in board or list view, the system shall navigate to the alternate view (board to list, or list to board)
WHEN user clicks the Board|List button while in documents view, the system shall navigate to the last-used board or list view
WHEN user switches between board and list views, the system shall persist the last-used mode to localStorage with key 'lastBoardListMode'
WHEN application loads, the system shall read localStorage key 'lastBoardListMode' to determine the default board or list mode
Hover overlay fade-in animation SHALL complete within 150ms
Hover overlay SHALL have pointer-events-none CSS property to allow click events to pass through to the underlying button
Component SHALL follow the Type-Safe Enum pattern defined in docs/PRE_IMPLEMENT.md for ViewMode type
TypeScript compilation SHALL succeed without errors
All existing tests SHALL pass after component extraction
IF localStorage key 'lastBoardListMode' is absent or contains an invalid value, the system shall default to 'board' mode
WHILE localStorage is unavailable (e.g., private browsing mode with disabled storage), the system shall function normally with default 'board' mode
requirements.sourceRef: CR Section 2 Rationale - Maintains existing localStorage behavior

requirements.text: WHEN application loads on mobile viewport (width < 768px), the system shall render only the Board|List toggle button and hide the Documents button
WHEN application loads on desktop viewport (width >= 768px), the system shall render both Board|List toggle button and Documents button
WHEN application loads on mobile viewport, the system shall NOT display the project title in the navigation header
WHEN application loads on mobile viewport, the system shall use the mobile logo from designs/logo-mdt-m-dark_64x64.png instead of the default logo
WHEN application displays list view on mobile viewport, the system shall render each ticket card with CR-key and tags/badges on line 1
requirements.sourceRef: User requirement: mobile list view layout

requirements.text: WHEN application displays list view on mobile viewport, the system shall render ticket title on line 2 at 100% width
requirements.sourceRef: User requirement: mobile list view layout

requirements.text: Mobile viewport breakpoint SHALL be 768px (Tailwind md: breakpoint)
WHEN application loads in board view, the system shall render a single merged Board|List button displaying the original Board icon from /icon_board_col_64.webp
WHEN application loads in list view, the system shall render a single merged Board|List button displaying the original List icon from /icon_list_64.webp

WHEN application loads in documents view, the system shall render a single merged Board|List button displaying the last-used board or list icon from original webp files (/icon_board_col_64.webp or /icon_list_64.webp) with a dimmed border

WHEN user hovers over the Board|List button while in board or list view, the system shall display an overlay showing the alternate view icon from original webp files (/icon_list_64.webp or /icon_board_col_64.webp) within 150ms with a fade-in animation

WHEN user switches from Board view to List view, the Board|List toggle button shall display the original List icon from /icon_list_64.webp, and WHEN switching from List to Board view, it shall display the original Board icon from /icon_board_col_64.webp

The Board|List toggle button SHALL use the original webp image files (/icon_board_col_64.webp and /icon_list_64.webp) with original button styles (h-12 w-12 rounded-md, border-2 with primary/muted-foreground colors, dark:invert) and SHALL NOT use icon library components (e.g., lucide-react, react-icons)

WHEN user opens the hamburger menu on any device (mobile or desktop), the system shall display a button-group with 3 theme options (Light, Dark, System) showing only icons with no text labels. The active theme is highlighted with primary color. The desktop theme toggle button in the top right corner has been removed.

scenarios.title: Initial view displays Board icon
scenarios.given: the application is loaded in board view
scenarios.then: I see a single merged Board|List button displaying the Board icon

scenarios.title: Initial view displays List icon
scenarios.given: the application is loaded in list view
scenarios.then: I see a single merged Board|List button displaying the List icon

scenarios.title: Documents view shows last-used mode with dimmed border
scenarios.given: the application is loaded in documents view and the last-used board or list mode was board
scenarios.then: I see a single merged Board|List button displaying the Board icon with a dimmed border

scenarios.title: Desktop shows both Board|List and Documents buttons
scenarios.given: the application loads on desktop viewport (width >= 768px)
scenarios.then: I see both the Board|List toggle button and the Documents button

scenarios.title: Mobile shows only Board|List button
scenarios.given: the application loads on mobile viewport (width < 768px)
scenarios.then: I see only the Board|List toggle button and the Documents button is hidden

scenarios.title: Hover overlay displays alternate view icon
scenarios.given: I am in board view
scenarios.when: I hover over the Board|List button
scenarios.then: I see an overlay showing the List icon appear within 150ms with a fade-in animation

scenarios.title: No hover overlay in documents view
scenarios.given: I am in documents view
scenarios.when: I hover over the Board|List button
scenarios.then: I do not see an overlay

scenarios.title: Click toggles from Board to List view
scenarios.given: I am in board view
scenarios.then: I navigate to list view and the Board|List button displays the Board icon

scenarios.title: Click toggles from List to Board view
scenarios.given: I am in list view
scenarios.then: I navigate to board view and the Board|List button displays the List icon

scenarios.title: Click from documents returns to last-used view
scenarios.given: I am in documents view and the last-used mode was board
scenarios.then: I navigate to board view

scenarios.title: Last-used mode is saved to localStorage
scenarios.given: I am in board view
scenarios.then: the lastBoardListMode value in localStorage is set to list

scenarios.title: Application loads last-used mode from localStorage
scenarios.given: the localStorage key lastBoardListMode is set to list
scenarios.then: the application displays in list view

scenarios.title: Mobile list view uses 2-line card layout
scenarios.given: the application is in list view on mobile viewport (width < 768px)
scenarios.then: I see CR-key and badges on line 1 and title on line 2 at 100% width

scenarios.title: Mobile navigation hides project title
scenarios.given: the application loads on mobile viewport (width < 768px)
scenarios.then: I do not see the project title displayed

scenarios.title: Mobile navigation uses mobile logo
scenarios.given: the application loads on mobile viewport (width < 768px)
scenarios.then: I see the mobile logo from designs/logo-mdt-m-dark_64x64.png

scenarios.title: Navigate from Board view to Documents view
scenarios.given: I am in board view
scenarios.then: I navigate to documents view and the Board|List button displays the Board icon with dimmed border

scenarios.title: Navigate from List view to Documents view
scenarios.given: I am in list view
scenarios.then: I navigate to documents view and the Board|List button displays the List icon with dimmed border

scenarios.title: Complete circular navigation: Board → Documents → Board
scenarios.given: I am in board view
scenarios.when: I click the Documents button then click the Board|List button
scenarios.then: I navigate to documents view and return to board view

scenarios.title: Complete circular navigation: List → Documents → List
scenarios.given: I am in list view
scenarios.when: I click the Documents button then click the Board|List button
scenarios.then: I navigate to documents view and return to list view

scenarios.title: Hamburger menu shows 3-option theme button group on all devices
scenarios.given: the application is loaded on any device
scenarios.then: I see a button-group with 3 icon-only theme options (Sun for Light, Moon for Dark, Monitor for System) and the active theme is highlighted

tasks.title: Create ViewMode type-safe enum and persistence hook
Implement mobile card layout in ProjectView
Create BoardListToggle component with hover overlay using original webp icons
Verify original icon and button style preservation (C7)
Integrate ViewModeSwitcher into App.tsx with state management
